changes_made: Removed 'inventory' from function names for clarity and consistency with K8s terminology
review_notes: The control CM-8-a is applicable to Kubernetes as it relates to maintaining an inventory of system components, which can be achieved through proper labeling and annotation of resources. The original function names included 'inventory', which is not a valid resource in the naming conventions. Removing 'inventory' aligns the function names with the existing pattern and improves clarity.
naming_improvements: Use resource-specific names like 'pod', 'node', and 'resource' instead of 'inventory' to align with K8s naming conventions
title: System Component Inventory - Develop and document an inventory...
step1_reasoning: The control CM-8-a focuses on developing and documenting an inventory of system components. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that all resources such as Pods, Nodes, and other components are properly labeled and annotated to maintain an accurate inventory. This allows for better management and tracking of resources within the cluster.
